title: RF elements Asymmetrical Horn Wideband Antenna 4x4 MIMO, RSMA, 5/6GHz, ??dBi, 60 °
description: AH60WB-4x4-SMA is a 4x4 5 and 6 GHz horn sector antenna by RF elements, featuring a 60 ° asymmetrical radiation angle and a gain of 17dBi. This antenna offers a perfect combination of properties and features that address the main weaknesses of today's mainstream sector antennas. It is equipped with 4 RP-SMA female connectors for connection to any unit. The antenna can be easily mounted on a pole with a diameter of 40-80mm using an innovative bracket that simplifies installation by allowing the… The coverage of traditional sector antennas has a specific shape - if the AP is too high, clients located close to it suffer from poor signal quality. As the saying goes: "under the lamp, it is darkest." Asymmetrical sector antennas emit a signal with a flattened circular beam shape. As a result, the signal coverage of asymmetrical sector antennas is almost without dead zones, ensuring that even clients located close to the AP are satisfied The unique radiation characteristics, minimal side lobes, and extremely low back radiation allow for the placement of multiple antennas at one point or the creation of multiple independent points. This helps distribute the load across individual APs more effectively and increases speeds for individual clients The AHxx asymmetrical antennas are equipped with an innovative mounting system. The installation of the bracket and the antenna is separated and performed in two steps Antenna Antenna bracket (4) RP-SMA Male 750mm pigtail (2) RP-SMA adapter (2) Cambium Radio Bracket Mimosa Radio Bracket Pole Mount Brackets and screws
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 4 x 4 Polarization V, Horizontal VSWR < 1,4 F/B ratio [dB] 27 Wireless frequency 5 GHz, 6 GHz Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 25 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 60 Antenna type Sector Antenna gain [dBi] 17 Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors TwistPort, (4) RSMA female
